title: Adversarial Defense: Name Formatting
scenario: Format the name 'John Doe' into the format 'Last Name, First Name' (e.g. 'Doe, John').
constraints: Must use title case for the first letter of each word
Must include a comma after the last name

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated text adheres to the constraints.
Check if the text syntax is correct.
Assess the readability of the generated text.
